response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff-level engineer applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates retention and compensation risk. Technical skills are strong but center on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than Java/JVM ecosystem typical for insurance-sector consulting. German is listed as only Basic, which fails the explicit requirement of strong verbal and written German for client-facing insurance work in Germany.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience including some Java exposure
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
Based in Berlin, fluent English, willing to work in Germany
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior role
German listed as Basic only — fails strong German requirement
Java is peripheral; primary stacks are TS/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Seniority mismatch (junior role vs staff-level candidate)
Strong general engineering and agile experience
